cyber_fraud.title: Cyber Fraud Complaint
cyber_fraud.template: I am writing to report a cyber fraud incident that occurred on {date} at {time}. An amount of ₹{amount} was fraudulently transferred from my account. I request immediate investigation and action.

domestic_violence.title: Domestic Violence Complaint
domestic_violence.template: I am filing a complaint regarding domestic violence that occurred on {date}. I request police protection and legal action under applicable laws.

sexual_harassment.title: Sexual Harassment Complaint
sexual_harassment.template: I would like to report a case of sexual harassment that occurred on {date}. I request immediate investigation and protection.
